# SmoothScroll
> Source-available smooth-scrolling utility with configurable easing and per-app controls.

## Official pages
- [English overview](https://smoothscroll.top/)
- [Vietnamese overview](https://smoothscroll.top/vi/)
- [Chinese overview](https://smoothscroll.top/zh/)
- [How SmoothScroll works](https://smoothscroll.top/how-it-works/)
- [Vietnamese guide](https://smoothscroll.top/vi/how-it-works/)
- [Chinese guide](https://smoothscroll.top/zh/how-it-works/)
- [Source, releases, issues, and license](https://github.com/quangtruong2003/SmoothScroll)
